pkgmetadata.longdescription: Qcloud COSv5 SDK.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypivcos-python-sdk-v5.svg target httpspypi.orgsearchqcos-python-sdk-v5 alt Pypi.. image httpsapi.travis-ci.comtencentyuncos-python-sdk-v5.svgbranchmaster target httpsapp.travis-ci.comgithubtencentyuncos-python-sdk-v5 alt Travis CI _______COSV5Python SDK, Python2.6Python2.7Python3.x__________pip pip install -U cos-python-sdk-v5 python setup.py install__________python sdk httpsgithub.comtencentyuncos-python-sdk-v5blobmasterdemodemo.pycos httpscloud.tencent.comdocumentproduct4366224python sdk httpscloud.tencent.comdocumentproduct43612269python sdk httpscloud.tencent.comdocumentproduct43612270
